name: Poked Pina Colada Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Yellow cake mix with pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to package directions for a 9x13-inch cake.
2. While the cake is baking, combine the pina colada mix and sweetened condensed milk in a bowl. Stir well until combined.
3. After the cake has finished baking and is still hot, use the handle of a wooden spoon to punch holes evenly throughout the top layer of the cake.
4. Pour the pina colada mixture over the punched areas of the cake.
5. Allow the cake to cool completely before proceeding.
6. Once cooled, spread the Cool whip evenly over the top of the cake.
7. Sprinkle desired amounts of coconut over the Cool Whip topping.
NOTE: For added texture and flavor, consider using toasted coconut or placing additional coconut on top of the Cool Whip after it has been applied.
